title: galium molluginoides
intro: Galium molluginoides, also known as False Heather, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Galium molluginoides include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. Galium molluginoides can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine practices.
